---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the problem or limitation you're running into. What are you trying to do that you can't do today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why you prefer your proposed solution.

## Which component(s) would be affected?

- [ ] Orchestration engine (`packages/core`)
- [ ] Gateway (`packages/gateway`)
- [ ] TUI (`packages/tui`)
- [ ] Web UI (`packages/web`)
- [ ] Skills SDK (`packages/skills-sdk`)
- [ ] Hindsight integration (`packages/hindsight`)
- [ ] New built-in skill (`default-skills/`)
- [ ] CLI / setup
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional context

Any mockups, examples from other tools, or related issues.
